summary: Phase 6 testing completed. All habit progress system features verified - Backend (10/10 tests passed) and Frontend (all features working). New features: Progress bar in habit cards, Q&A button with modal explaining progress rules, toast messages with progressGain percentage.
passed_tests: - POST /api/habits/{id}/track - returns 400 if already tracked today
- GET /api/habits - returns habits with progress field (0-100)
- streakBonus field is boolean (false for first day)
- Q&A modal opens on click - VERIFIED
- Q&A modal title 'Як працює прогрес?' - VERIFIED
- Q&A modal shows +1% per day rule - VERIFIED
- Q&A modal shows -1% per missed day rule - VERIFIED
- Q&A modal shows +5% bonus for 10 days rule - VERIFIED
- Q&A modal shows 100% achievement explanation - VERIFIED
- Progress bar in habit card - VERIFIED
- Progress bar color coding (red for low progress) - VERIFIED
- Toast message 'Звичку відмічено! +1%' on track - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: Progress bar color coding implemented correctly: red (<25%), orange (25-50%), yellow (50-80%), green (80-100%)
Toast message correctly shows streakBonus when applicable: '+X% (включає бонус за 10 днів!)'
Q&A modal content matches the progress system rules exactly
seed_data_creation: Test users created: habit_ui_test_f585251f@test.com (level 3), multiple test habits created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 habit progress system features implemented and working: 1) POST /api/habits/{id}/track returns progressGain (1-6) and streakBonus (boolean), 2) POST /api/habits/check-missed-days reduces progress by 1% per missed day, 3) Progress bar in habit card with color coding, 4) Q&A button (?) next to add habit button opens modal with progress rules, 5) Toast shows '+X%' on habit track. Features unlock at level 3. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_habit_progress.py.
